Mineral Extractor.description: Extracts raw minerals from the planetary crust.

Biofarm Complex.description: Cultivates engineered crops to feed the colony population.

Research Node.description: A distributed computation cluster that accelerates research.

Ether Conduit.description: Channels ambient Etheric Energy into usable power.

Defense Array.description: Planetary defense grid that reduces orbital threat level.

Trade Nexus.description: Commercial hub boosting trade income from this planet.

Neural Institute.description: Advanced research facility interfacing biological and digital minds.

Quantum Relay.description: Quantum-entanglement communications node; accelerates all research.

Bio-Synthesis Lab.description: Synthesises exotic bio-materials from local organisms.

Deep Core Drill.description: Pierces deep into the planetary core for ultra-dense minerals.

Etheric Purifier.description: Purifies corrupted Etheric zones, enabling settlement and production.

Void Anchor.description: A gravitational anchor that stabilises void rifts and harvests dark energy.

Population Hub.description: A dense residential district that expands the colony's population cap.

Solar Harvester.description: Orbital solar array beaming clean power to the surface.

Xenobiology Station.description: Studies alien biomes to unlock unique research and diplomacy paths.

Ground Forces Barracks.description: Trains ground troops and light garrisoned units, contributing modest fleet points and local defense to the empire pool.

Anti-Orbital Battery.description: A plasma-fed surface-to-orbit cannon that raises planetary threat cost for attackers and boosts empire defense rating.

Munitions Factory.description: Converts raw ore directly into military ordinance, adding fleet points and a trickle of refined ore to the empire chain.

Planetary Shield Generator.description: Projects a graviton barrier across the upper atmosphere, dramatically increasing the colony's defense rating.

Command Citadel.description: A heavily-fortified joint-operations center that synchronises planetary defense grids with the fleet, boosting both defense and fleet-point output.

Tidal Energy Plant.description: Harvests kinetic energy from ocean tides and coastal currents, providing clean ether power and supplemental trade credits.

Geothermal Tap.description: Drills deep conduits into volcanic hot-spots, extracting massive geothermal ether and raw minerals as a by-product.

Crystal Resonance Array.description: Amplifies natural crystal-lattice vibrations to harvest dense Etheric Energy, with a secondary harmonic that speeds local research.

Atmospheric Processor.description: Seeds hostile atmospheres with engineered microbes, slowly converting barren terrain into arable land and freeing locked mineral deposits.

Jungle Harvester.description: A semi-autonomous canopy platform that extracts edible bio-matter and trace Etheric compounds from deep forest biomes.

Academy of Sciences.description: A formal institution of higher learning that trains researchers and contributes steady research points each turn.

Synthetic Mind Core.description: An autonomous AI research engine that operates continuously, producing the highest research yield of any surface structure.

Shipyard.description: Constructs and maintains warships, contributing fleet points to the empire pool each turn. Output scales with empire-wide refined ore supply from Ore Processors.

Chronometric Lab.description: A precision timekeeping and temporal-drift analysis facility. Synchronising local chronology with galactic reference frames accelerates research across all disciplines.
